历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3677 → 5755 → 6181 → 9186 → 3226, with significant fluctuations over five years: from 2021 to 2024, rankings continuously declined, with a cumulative decline of about 5509 places, but in 2025, there was a sharp advance to 3226, an increase of 5960 places compared to 2024, mainly due to the impact of Inner Mongolia's first new college entrance examination (physics category) batch merger and changes in subject selection requirements in 2025, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 3226; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Inner Mongolia: 58 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 60 in 2024, 62 in 2025, showing a slight increasing trend; the 2026 plan is 52, a decrease of 10 from 2025, a reduction of about 16.1%, and the tightening of enrollment quotas will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, and has been stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to a top-tier comprehensive university in China, with sustained appeal to candidates; in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation monitoring, Hunan University showed no obvious negative signals; it ranks 16th in overall TikTok school popularity, rated as 'high heat' (17 videos, comprehensive heat over 3.1 million), with high short video exposure, reflecting a high level of application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 8 disciplines received A- or above ratings: Chemistry (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Civil Engineering (A-), Computer Science and Technology (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), Applied Economics (A-), and Control Science and Engineering (A-), with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors in Inner Mongolia.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity shows: Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all 'high heat recommendations', which are exactly the core directions of the university's physics category enrollment in Inner Mongolia; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Inner Mongolia college entrance examination is about 154,000, and based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, the number of physics category candidates is about 110,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025's 83,700, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying overall competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, belonging to the Central China region, which is a cross-province application for Inner Mongolia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–1.5% (2024–2025), at a moderately low level, with regional preference having a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3226, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 16.1% (pushing rankings forward), the increase in Inner Mongolia physics category candidates by about 32% (pushing rankings backward), the university's high reputation and popular major endorsements, the supply-demand elasticity main value calculates to 2914, and after minor corrections, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking for science (physics category) is about 2944, with a fluctuation range of 2502–3386. The two factors of enrollment reduction and candidate surge offset each other, resulting in slightly intensified competition compared to 2025, with rankings moving forward slightly.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science and Technology (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology (Intelligent Experimental Class) (including Intelligent Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, etc.)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Artificial Intelligence (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Accounting (including Accounting (Smart Accounting), Accounting (ACCA), Financial Management)
- Finance

- Communication Engineering
- Automation (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Economics Class (including Economics, Public Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration (Organizational Digital Intelligence Management), Marketing (Smart Marketing))
- Intelligent Construction (including Intelligent Construction, Civil Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Class (including Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for 2026 is about 2944, with a range of 2502–3386. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (2502) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Integrated Circuits; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 2900–3100) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Accounting, Finance, and Intelligent Manufacturing, while also sprinting for Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (3386) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Economics Class, Business Administration, and Intelligent Construction as safety options, while striving for Tier 2 majors. Note that civil engineering and construction, as well as biology, chemistry, environment, and materials categories have relatively low social popularity, making competition for admission relatively moderate.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1041, 968, 1540, 802, and 432 respectively, showing a fluctuating forward trend: slight forward movement in 2021–2022, a significant backward shift to 1540 in 2023, and consecutive large forward movements in 2024–2025, reaching 432 in 2025, the best in five years, mainly due to the batch merger and subject selection changes in Inner Mongolia's new Gaokao (history category); the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 432. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia: 10 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, showing a year-on-year increase; the 2026 plan is 29, an increase of 15 from 2025, an expansion of about 107%, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; no significant negative signals were detected in the reputation monitoring for the 2026 Gaokao cycle; Douyin university popularity total ranking 16th, rated as 'high heat', with high short video exposure, reflecting a high level of application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, business administration (A) and applied economics (A-) are outstanding, highly matching the finance and economics majors recruited in Inner Mongolia's history category; law, Chinese language and literature, and other liberal arts majors, though not A-rated, benefit from the university's overall platform advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity shows: law is 'recommended', Chinese language/literature is 'recommended', finance/economics is 'differentiated wait-and-see'; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, with history category candidates estimated at about 43,100 based on a recent proportion of about 28%, an increase of about 32% from 32,600 in 2025, intensifying overall competition; Hunan University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, in Central China, which is a cross-province application for Inner Mongolia liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–1.5%, with regional preference having a neutral impact on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 432, a significant 107% expansion in 2026 (significantly pushing the ranking backward, greatly alleviating competition), and a 32% increase in Inner Mongolia history category candidates (pushing the ranking backward, intensifying competition), the supply-demand elasticity main value calculates to 710, and after minor correction, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking for liberal arts (history category) is about 690, with a fluctuation range of 586–794. The expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, so overall competition is significantly eased compared to 2025, with the ranking notably shifting backward.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for 2026 is about 690, with a range of 586–794. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (586) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature; those with rankings in the middle range (about 650–750) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Finance and Economics, with a sprint for Tier 1 majors; candidates near the upper bound (794) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Public Administration and Accounting as safety options. Note that the social popularity of Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraging, so competition for applications is relatively moderate.
